label: Quick Trade
description: Market selector and trade panel with Kelly stake suggestion for prediction markets.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file.

0.6.note: Sync context; no loading state needed.

0.7.note: Empty state: Search icon + 'Search or select a market above' when no market selected.

1.1.note: Reads markets, quickTradeMarketId, setQuickTradeMarketId, placeTrade via usePredictionsData().

1.3.note: Market list is global catalogue — not org-scoped.

1.5.note: Strategy filter N/A for trade panel market selector.

3.1.note: Live ✓: real trade placement. Paper ✓: placeTrade posts simulated. Batch ✓: trade submission should be disabled.

3.2.note: Context reads isBatch; placeTrade calls placeMockOrder (batch-safe) but ideally disabled.

3.5.note: Paper: placeTrade produces simulated fill entry. Human verify toast shows simulated context.

l3.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: 3.3 — verify trade button disabled in batch mode; 3.4 — batch indicator visible.

4.1.note: MarketSelector and TradePanelInner delegate interactions — setQuickTradeMarketId and placeTrade both wired.

l4.notes: Human: 4.3/4.4 — form fields (market, outcome, side, stake, Kelly suggestion) present and submit produces fill; 4.7 N/A; 4.8 scroll.

5.1.note: Primary trade entry for PRED_POLY_ARB_SCE_1M, PREDICTION_POLY_ML_DIR_EVT_4H, PRED_BTC_CEFI_ARB_SCE_5M. Widget includes Kelly sizing suggestion.

l5.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: full trade flow — select market → choose outcome → enter stake → place → verify fill in recent fills + open positions.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb in widget file.

7.3.note: 25 lines — minimal, delegates to MarketSelector and TradePanelInner.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: selectedMarket derived inline but not in deps array.

8.1.note: No arbitrary font sizes in widget file.

8.3.note: Delegates to MarketSelector and TradePanelInner (trading components).

8.4.note: Agent: no bare img/input/div-onClick in widget file. Human: keyboard through market selector and stake input.

l8.notes: Agent checks pass. Human: 8.4 keyboard + 8.5 resize at minW=4.

keepSeparate.rationale: Trade panel is dedicated order entry — separate from market browser to allow focused trade workflow.

relationships.notes: Sets quickTradeMarketId which can be fed by pred-top-markets; also updates selectedMarketId for pred-market-detail cross-widget flow.

dataContract.notes: Production: REST POST to prediction market trade execution service (Polymarket/Kalshi API adapters).

gaps: Kelly sizing suggestion sourced from TradePanelInner — not yet wired to real Kelly calculator
Batch mode disable on trade button not yet implemented
coverage.notes: Widget delegates trade form rendering to TradePanelInner in components/trading/predictions/.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
